channel.title: Text-to-Speech on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Text-to-Speech on Arrans github.io

item.title: 2noise/ChatTTS
item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter

item.title: rhasspy/piper
item.description: A fast, local neural text to speech system

item.title: collabora/WhisperLive
item.description: A nearly-live implementation of OpenAI’s Whisper.
